final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing educational infographic explaining AI-related concepts and their relationships.

Style/medium: needs a hand-drawn illustration aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include each concept as a distinct visual node with connecting lines/arrows showing relationships, text labels and short definitions alongside each node
Subject: must include all 7 concepts with definitions and relationship annotations:
  - AI
  - MCP
  - AI Agent
  - OpenClaw
  - AI Skill
  - 蒸馏
  - CLI
Scene/backdrop: needs a light, approachable background suited to an educational diagram — exact treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a clear, friendly, easy-to-understand atmosphere — exact mood execution is yours
Color palette: needs a soft, readable direction — exact color choices are yours
Materials/textures: needs a hand-drawn / sketch texture treatment — exact line weight and paper feel are yours
Text (verbatim): must include all 7 concept labels verbatim: "AI", "MCP", "AI Agent", "OpenClaw", "AI Skill", "蒸馏", "CLI"
Constraints: must preserve all 7 concept names exactly as written; must show relationship connections between concepts visually; layout must be readable and approachable for a general audience
Avoid:
